concerns.text: FR-007 specifies sensitivity analysis sweeping cutoffs over {0.01, 0.05, 0.1} and reporting false-positive/false-negative rates. In hypothesis testing, FPR/FNR require ground truth about true null/alternative status, which is unavailable in observational data. The plan does not define what is being classified or what constitutes ground truth for these rates.

FR-007 states 'sweeping any decision cutoffs' without specifying what decision is being made (hypothesis test significance? model prediction threshold?). This ambiguity makes the sensitivity analysis purpose unclear and may lead to implementation that does not match the intended scientific question.
